problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
mechanism: Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine
hypothesis: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Cortical. Cortical spreading depression mechanism in migraine directly addresses this.
